clEntries.7.5.43: v7.5.42: Fixed fingerprint matching for devices with mixed-case manufacturer/product IDs across bulb_dimmable, button_wireless_2, button_wireless_plug, and fingerbot drivers., Added case-normalized fingerprint variants from Johan Benz upstream sync, improving device pairing reliability., Expanded fingerprint database with normalized casings to handle firmware variability.
clEntries.7.5.42: New fingerprints added across bulb_dimmable, button_wireless_2, button_wireless_plug, fingerbot via case normalization.
clEntries.7.5.41: v7.5.41 - 3,202 new fingerprints from ZHA, Z2M, Z-Link and ZCT. Battery endpoint scan fix, Fingerbot capability timing fix, and kinetic detection improvement for soil sensors.
clEntries.7.5.40: Bug fix: Empty battery reports on sleepy devices resolved with adaptive battery listeners and ZCL/IAS fallbacks.
clEntries.7.5.39: Updated 3202 fingerprints across 228 drivers. Added new device support and minor fixes.
clEntries.7.5.38: No user-facing changes in this release.
clEntries.7.5.37: Fix all runtime syntax errors, resolve unclosed braces, add support for wall_remote_2_gang assets and validate SDK3 compliance
clEntries.7.5.35: v7.5.34: Fixed condition card registration in `air_quality_comprehensive` and `din_rail_meter` drivers (resolved runtime errors), Restored draft-to-test , Standardized button flow cards (button_pressed, button_double_press, button_long_press, button_multi_press, button_release, knob_rotated), Added OTA check updates action card, Added tuya_dp_send_typed and tuya_dp
clEntries.7.5.34: v7.5.34: Fixed condition card registration in air_quality_comprehensive and din_rail_meter drivers. Standardized button flow cards. Synced upstream fixes from .
clEntries.7.5.33: Fixed condition cards in air quality & DIN rail meter drivers. Added standardized button flow triggers (press, double press, long press, release, knob rotation). Synced upstream driver improvements and updated app assets.
